content.userStoryNarrative:
As a QA user
I want to generate test cases
So that I can review coverage
content.criteria:
- Detail page opens in a new tab
- Display current status
content.acceptanceCriteria:
Scenario 1: Open detail page
Given the user is on the list page
When the user clicks the detail name
Then the detail page opens in a new tab
And the tab title matches the entity name

Scenario 2: Display current status
Given the user is on the detail page
When the page is loaded
Then the current status is displayed
And the updated date uses yyyy-MM-dd
